crises.crisisName: Escalation of Hostilities in the OPT Flash Appeal 2026
crises.summary: Occupied Palestinian Territory's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 3,365,680 people in need, $4,064,305,808 requested, $489,736,841 received, and a $3,574,568,967 funding gap as of 2026-02-10.

crises.crisisName: Syrian Arab Republic Humanitarian Response Priorities 2026
crises.summary: Syrian Arab Republic's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 14,743,038 people in need, $2,922,184,830 requested, $475,992,263 received, and a $2,446,192,567 funding gap as of 2026-04-09.

crises.crisisName: Sudan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Sudan's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 28,872,672 people in need, $2,866,228,593 requested, $578,934,255 received, and a $2,287,294,338 funding gap as of 2026-03-02.

crises.crisisName: Yemen Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Yemen's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 19,319,378 people in need, $2,162,563,336 requested, $300,431,231 received, and a $1,862,132,105 funding gap as of 2026-04-17.

crises.crisisName: Ukraine Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Ukraine's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 6,539,382 people in need, $2,303,961,975 requested, $696,821,595 received, and a $1,607,140,380 funding gap as of 2026-01-21.

crises.crisisName: Afghanistan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Afghanistan's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 17,412,653 people in need, $1,714,181,496 requested, $264,117,637 received, and a $1,450,063,859 funding gap as of 2026-02-25.

crises.crisisName: South Sudan Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: South Sudan's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 7,650,962 people in need, $1,463,046,056 requested, $356,281,559 received, and a $1,106,764,497 funding gap as of 2026-03-02.

crises.crisisName: République Démocratique du Congo Besoins Humanitaires et Plan de Réponse 2026
crises.summary: Democratic Republic of the Congo's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 13,003,064 people in need, $1,403,721,718 requested, $456,334,173 received, and a $947,387,545 funding gap as of 2026-02-25.

crises.crisisName: Tchad Besoins Humanitaires et Plan de Réponse 2026
crises.summary: Chad's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 2,913,694 people in need, $986,069,627 requested, $232,824,551 received, and a $753,245,076 funding gap as of 2026-02-25.

crises.crisisName: Somalia Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Somalia's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 4,989,936 people in need, $852,000,000 requested, $138,982,458 received, and a $713,017,542 funding gap as of 2026-04-17.

crises.crisisName: Haiti Besoins Humanitaires et Plan de Réponse 2026
crises.summary: Haiti's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 5,910,721 people in need, $880,327,426 requested, $188,698,672 received, and a $691,628,754 funding gap as of 2026-02-25.

crises.crisisName: Myanmar Humanitarian Needs and Response Plan 2026
crises.summary: Myanmar's latest OCHA 2026 plan reports 11,596,899 people in need, $889,600,798 requested, $250,689,233 received, and a $638,911,565 funding gap as of 2026-02-25.
